response.global_analysis: 1. Spoken Language: English. Both original ('og') and English ('en') translations are identical. 2. Reference JSON: Used to guide character context (Ninomae Ina'nis playing Minecraft). No vocal music present; solely dialogue. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed carefully around vocal pause gaps during Minecraft farming gameplay to prevent cascading delays.
